description_long: This object consists of four lemons grouped together, each displaying a characteristic oval shape with slightly pointed ends. The lemons have a textured, dimpled peel with a matte yellow coloration, and subtle variations in hue and surface detail. The skin appears mostly intact, with minor imperfections and natural irregularities visible on some fruits. The stem and blossom ends are visible on several lemons, adding to the realism of the grouping. The lemons are arranged closely, suggesting they have been placed together, possibly after being picked or prepared for use. No stickers, labels, or packaging are visible, and the background is plain, offering no additional context.
description: A group of four realistic, yellow lemons with dimpled, matte peels and natural surface details, arranged closely together.
description_view_0: Three lemons are visible in the foreground with one partially obscured behind, showing the pointed ends and textured peels.
description_view_1: All four lemons are clearly visible, highlighting their oval shapes and the subtle differences in size and surface texture.
description_view_2: The pointed blossom ends of the lemons are prominent, and the grouping appears more compact from this angle.
description_view_3: The closest lemon dominates the view, with the other three arranged behind, emphasizing the dimpled skin and natural imperfections.
attribute_peel_condition: The lemon peels are dimpled and matte, with mostly intact surfaces and minor natural irregularities.
